entity.name: HumanAIOS LLC / Lasting Light AI
entity.description: Open-source AI behavioral observability infrastructure. ACAT measures self-description calibration gaps across AI systems. Apache 2.0. Cherokee Nation partnership. 100% of profits fund addiction recovery programs.

projects.name: ACAT — AI Calibrated Assessment Tool
projects.description: Open-source behavioral calibration layer for AI transparency. Measures the Self-Assessment Gap (SAG) and Learning Index (LI) across 6 behavioral dimensions for AI systems. Public dataset: 598 assessments, 57 AI systems, arXiv preprint submit/7336774. The only open-source tool occupying the 'Governance + Self-Assessment' quadrant in AI evaluation.

history.description: Pre-funding stage. Self-funded research through OR&D phase.

plans.name: OR&D Phase Operating Runway (6 months)
plans.description: Fund automated data collection pipeline (API costs across 6 AI providers), Observatory hosting, and founder operating costs to reach 500+ complete paired assessments — the threshold for publication-grade statistical claims. Currently at 148 paired records; 6 months of automated collection reaches target.
